instruction: Help me organize the team skill status into the report

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Skill'
ws['B1'] = 'Expert'
ws['C1'] = 'Proficient'
ws['D1'] = 'Familiar'
ws['A2'] = 'Python'
ws['B2'] = 8
ws['C2'] = 15
ws['D2'] = 12
ws['A3'] = 'Data Analysis'
ws['B3'] = 6
ws['C3'] = 18
ws['D3'] = 10
ws['A4'] = 'Machine Learning'
ws['B4'] = 4
ws['C4'] = 8
ws['D4'] = 18
ws['A5'] = 'Cloud Computing'
ws['B5'] = 3
ws['C5'] = 12
ws['D5'] = 20
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/skill_matrix.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the team skill status into the report
Find the skill with the most experts from /home/user/Desktop/skill_matrix.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/skill_report.txt: 'Team Top Skill: Python (8 experts, 15 proficient)', save

include: Team Top Skill: Python (8 experts, 15 proficient)
